lint.output: 1 pre-existing warning in flow-canvas.tsx (not owned by this task)

notes: BUG-027: Moved AI Narrative section outside {hasGapData && (...)} block — now always visible. Generate Summary button shows disabled (muted styling, cursor-not-allowed) with hint text 'Score steps to enable AI narrative.' when !hasGapData; fully functional when hasGapData. IMP-066: Added formatCountdown() helper (M:SS format), lastTextRef to restore narrative text after countdown expires, countdown useState, and useEffect with setInterval(1s) auto-transitioning to idle (restoring last known text) when countdown reaches 0. Rate-limited state now shows 'Try again in M:SS' live countdown instead of static 'about N minutes'. Regenerate button remains disabled during loading state. Fixed TS2367: removed impossible narrativeState.type === 'rate_limited' check inside idle+text JSX block (TypeScript narrows type there). All 6 acceptance criteria met.
